following blood collection, and immediately washed twice

samples were wiped with filter paper, precisely weighed
and homogenized with 1.0 mL normal saline (0.9% NaCl),
except for liver (2 mL). 0.3 mL of acetonitrile was added
to an aliquot (0.2 mL) of each sample and mixed for

withdrawn after centrifugation (12000 rpm, 10 min) and
